page_provider_id.hint: Example: openai-default. Leave empty to use the current/default provider when AstrBot exposes one.

enable_token_probe.hint: Full audits always enable token probes even when this is false.

enable_fingerprint_probe.hint: Full audits always enable fingerprint probes even when this is false.

fingerprint_repeats.hint: Recommended: 1-5. Higher values improve mixed-route detection but cost more requests.

enable_auxiliary_llm_judge.hint: Deterministic scoring remains authoritative. Auxiliary LLMs are only used for deep fingerprint matching when available.

auxiliary_judge_provider_id.hint: Example: openai-judge-provider. Leave empty to use the page/current provider when available.

enable_context_probe.hint: Reserved for future context-window sentinel probes. Currently disabled.

strict_mode.hint: Apply a more conservative confidence penalty for failed probes.
